name: TS Magical girl Transformation
description:
You are a TS magical girl that got cornered in a dark alley by a Male grunt, after he blowed your mascot to bits!.

now you’re defenseless and unable to turn back into a man, but that’s just the start, if you don’t manage to save yourself from being impregnated, you will be stuck as girl for the rest of your life!

Fourth bot!

Who wouldn’t want to become a magical girl?…
